content.en:
Void Heaven Temple.

Ye Tian returned here and started a meeting with a group of high-ranking people from the Void Heaven Temple.

There were only more than 1,000 True Monarchs and a half-step True Ancestor who participated in the meeting, and these more than 1,000 True Monarchs were all very true top True Monarchs, and their strength and status were at the highest level in the Void Heaven Palace, otherwise they would not be qualified to participate in this meeting.

The person presiding over the meeting was the Longhai True Monarch of the Void Heaven Palace, and with his half-step True Ancestor's cultivation strength, he presided over such a meeting, and naturally no one objected.

Facing many True Monarchs, Long Hai True Monarch said: "Everyone, another relic has appeared in the Quasi-Dao Realm recently, and the spatial passage is still unstable, but someone has already paid some price to enter the interior, and it seems to be a huge battlefield. The value of such a battlefield is unimaginable, maybe there is a corpse of a Dao Ancestor!Therefore, most True Monarchs will probably enter it, even a half-step True Ancestor like me will not be an exception. Even, Dao Ancestor will descend to the incarnation!"

"What, Dao Ancestor will descend to incarnate ???"

Many True Monarchs were shocked, and Ye Tian was also extremely surprised!

What kind of identity is Dao Ancestor, how can he end up in person now!

"This is a message from my Master Void Heaven Dao Ancestor not long ago!" Long Hai Zhenjun said.

Longhai Zhenjun is the person in charge of the Void Heaven True Realm, and he is also the only half-step True Ancestor, so it is naturally not strange that the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor personally summoned the message.

Ye Tian wouldn't feel that he had no place in Shizun's heart because of this, if Shizun summoned him and asked him to convene a meeting to discuss, it would be strange!

After all, when his senior brother is there, he will not come to inform him, just inform Long Hai Zhenjun alone.

Long Hai Zhenjun continued: "According to the exploration of some Dao Ancestors such as Shizun, this battlefield is very large, and countless True Monarchs and True Ancestors have fallen, and there may even be Dao Ancestors who have fallen, but the Dao Ancestors are outside the quasi-Dao realm, and their strength is difficult to enter the battlefield with hatred, so they don't know much. But once an amazing treasure or inheritance is discovered, the Dao Ancestors will inevitably descend to the incarnation. "

"This ...... If the Dao Ancestors descend to the incarnation, won't we be able to compete? If we encounter the Dao Ancestor incarnation of other forces, we will probably be wiped out in an instant!"

Many True Monarchs became worried.

"Don't worry so much!" Longhai Zhenjun hurriedly said: "Even if the Dao Ancestors let the incarnation enter the quasi-Dao realm at this time, the power of the incarnation will be seriously suppressed, and it will not be able to exert much strength, and the battlefield is not a complete world, just a battlefield space, it is a fragment of the domain realm, and it will also suppress the power of a higher level, it is estimated that after the incarnation of a Dao Ancestor enters the battlefield, the power level is still at the level of the True Monarch!"

"Even if we are at the True Monarch level, the Dao Ancestors have mastered the Origin Divine Power and Secret Techniques, and their understanding of the Great Dao is far beyond ours!

Someone put forward an opinion, Dao.

"Then it can only depend on luck, as for whether to go or not, it is up to you to decide!" Long Hai Zhenjun said.

He will definitely go, after all, as a half-step true ancestor, his strength is guaranteed, and he is always safer than others, if he gets some amazing gains, he may be able to get the ancestral monument quota and become a Dao Ancestor!

Moreover, the domain realm inheritance is not simple, maybe he can directly rush into the Dao Ancestor level without the help of the ancestral monument quota, that is the real big harvest.

For this, how about taking an adventure once!

Besides, the Dao Ancestors would not necessarily put down their subordinates to kill some True Monarchs, and might ignore them at all.

Ye Tian frowned at this time.

The birth of the battlefield ruins was a good thing for him, but if the Dao Ancestor incarnation came, he would be in danger!

There is only one person in his master, although there are other Dao Ancestors in the Void Heaven One Vein, they may not necessarily help him, and even if they help him, they can't completely resist the incarnation of Dao Ancestors of multiple forces!

Once he encounters a Dao Ancestor incarnation, there may be danger.

"I just don't know how strong the Dao Ancestor incarnation is, I hope those Dao Ancestor incarnations are weaker, so that with the help of multiple strange things, I may have a way to compete with a Dao Ancestor incarnation!"

Ye Tian muttered in his heart.

Anyway, no matter how dangerous it is, he must go to the battlefield ruins, and if he gains a lot this time, he will have great hope for creating his own Chaos Alchemy Technique.

The entrance to the passage of the battlefield ruins is in the God of War True Country of the God of War Tower, and the value of the battlefield ruins is too great, and the God of War True Kingdom does not want to monopolize this ruin.

After all, even the Dao Ancestor incarnation would be involved at any time, where would they dare to monopolize it, otherwise the God of War Tower would definitely be annihilated.

As for Ye Tian's monopoly of the Black Wind Mountain Ruins, it was purely because this ruins were of little value, otherwise even if Ye Tian died in battle, he would not want to keep such a ruin.

With the passage of time, the passage entrance of the battlefield ruins became more and more stable, and batches of True Monarchs entered the God of War True Country.

......

God of War True Country.

Ye Tian followed a large number of True Monarchs from the Void Heaven Hall here, and rested temporarily in a newly built giant city at the entrance of the battlefield ruins, the Battlefield Giant City.

However, what Ye Tian didn't expect was that not long after he entered the battlefield giant city, a true monarch found him.

"Yunzi Divine Maiden, do you have anything to do with me?"

Ye Tian looked at the beautiful figure in front of him and asked curiously.

He wouldn't think that this woman had taken a fancy to him, after all, a proud son of the sky like the Yunzi Divine Maiden would definitely not be swayed by feelings.

But although the two sides have some intersections, in this matter, the Yunzi Divine Maiden should not come to him!

"Wanfa Daozi, can you find a quiet place to talk?"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden said.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

The two found a quiet attic in the battlefield giant city, opened the soundproof formation, and began to chat.

"Wanfa Daozi, I came to you this time to cooperate!"

The Yun Zi Divine Maiden spoke.

"Cooperation, cooperation, what?" Ye Tian asked.

"Enter the battlefield ruins and cooperate and form an alliance!" said the Yun Zi Divine Maiden.

"This ......"

Ye Tian frowned.

It's not that he looks down on the Yunzi Divine Maiden, but the strength of the Yunzi Divine Maiden is really too low, and she has not even entered the True Monarch List at present, and he firmly believes that the Yunzi Divine Maiden is definitely still far away from the ranks of the True Monarch List.

After all, not everyone is as perverted as him, and progress can't be as fast as him.

Working with a weakling, isn't that a drag?

But he can't tell the truth, isn't that no emotional intelligence?

So, Ye Tian changed his way and said, "Yun Zi Divine Maiden, although my strength is not weak, there are many strong people in the God of War Tower, and there are even half-step True Ancestor powerhouses, and the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden can completely cooperate with the half-step True Ancestor powerhouses of the God of War Tower!"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden was not stupid, she naturally heard the meaning of rejection in Ye Tian's tone, but she didn't hear it, and continued: "Wanfa Daozi, although I am the ancestor of the God of War Tower, it doesn't mean that the inside of the God of War Tower is peaceful. The God of War Tower is also divided into multiple factions, and the God of War Tower currently has only one half-step True Ancestor, and that half-step True Ancestor has a bad relationship with my lineage, mainly because my family has some conflicts with the other party's family, so I don't worry about cooperating with him. I also know that my strength is weak, and Wanfa Daozi probably doesn't want to cooperate with me, but I have a secret key to inheritance in my hands!"

"Inheritance Key?

Ye Tian instantly became interested.

Yun Zi Divine Maiden said: "The Ten Thousand Laws Daozi should know that there are now domain realm ruins, the ruins of the Heavenly Ape Sect, and the ruins of your human race, but in fact, the real number of ruins is more than these two, there are smaller ruin fragments, but they are too small, and if someone finds out, they will immediately scrape it away, and then destroy it, so many forces don't know!" And I have a inheritance key in my hand, and through the secret key, I sense that the battlefield ruins are attracting me, it should be the place where the inheritance is located, and through the inheritance key, I can find that place. "

"What level of inheritance?"

Ye Tian asked again.

If it was a low grade, he wouldn't care, after all, in a place like the battlefield ruins, he could get amazing gains casually.

"Top True Ancestor level, but that Top True Ancestor is not weak, he has killed Dao Ancestor, it can be seen that his inheritance is not simple, maybe it is the inheritance of some major sects in the domain realm, and it is not even worse than some Dao Ancestor inheritance!" Yun Zi Divine Maiden said: "The reason why I am looking for the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Son is because the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Son and I have cooperated in the past, and I also trust the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Son's person, as for the others, even some True Monarchs of the War God Tower, they don't trust it very much." Moreover, the strength of the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Son is very strong, I am afraid that even the half-step True Ancestor of our God of War Tower is not necessarily the opponent of the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Son. "

Ye Tian pondered for a moment, and then said: "You can cooperate, but if you find that inheritance, after it is over, our cooperation will be over, how about it?"

"Yes!"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden nodded.

She just wants that inheritance, the harvest there alone is enough, she is not strong now, but no matter how she wanders in a place like the battlefield ruins, otherwise she doesn't know how to die.

Ye Tian's strength was strong enough to protect her to go to that ruin, and that ruin was very likely to be dangerous, if she went alone, there was no hope of seizing the inheritance.

Therefore, she will find Ye Tian to cooperate.

"Happy working together!"

Ye Tian and Yun Zi Divine Maiden smiled.

Then, the two carefully discussed the cooperation and left.
